description_long: This is a robust, rectangular storage box with a deep brown color and a solid, industrial design. The box features a recessed top opening, likely for depositing or retrieving items, and has three prominent horizontal ridges on its front and sides, adding structural strength and visual interest. The front face displays a blurred label area with what appears to be Japanese katakana script, suggesting it may be used for specific categorized storage or waste collection. One side of the box has a white icon resembling a duck and some additional signage, while the opposite side is mostly plain except for subtle panel lines. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic, giving it durability for outdoor or urban use, such as on sidewalks, in parks, or near public facilities. The overall construction suggests it is weather-resistant and designed for repeated public interaction.
description: A sturdy, brown rectangular storage box with a recessed top opening, horizontal ridges, and signage on the front and side, likely made of hard plastic for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the recessed top, three horizontal ridges, and a blurred label area with Japanese script.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a mostly plain surface with subtle panel lines and a white icon resembling a duck with additional signage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the recessed top and horizontal ridges, but lacks any signage or labels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features the white duck icon and signage, with the same structural ridges as other sides.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed label area and icon signage
